title: Email Marketing: 2 campaigns/month
content:
Email Marketing: 2 campaigns/month
Monthly Analytics & Reporting
Ideal For: Small businesses seeking a foundational digital presence and gradual growth.

#### 2. Growth Package: $5,000/month
Startup Fee: $3,500 for Web Design & Development
Services Included:
Advanced Consulting, Strategy & Branding
Content Creation: 8 pieces/month including blogs
SEO & Blog Integration: 4 blog posts/month
Full Social Media Management: 3 platforms, including content calendar
PPC (Pay Per Click) Advertising Management (ad spend not included)
Email Marketing: 4 campaigns/month
Detailed Analytics & Reporting with Insights
Ideal For: Growing businesses ready to expand their reach and deepen market impact.

#### 3. Enterprise Package: $10,000/month
Startup Fee: $7,500 for Premium Web Design & Development
Services Included:
Strategic Consulting, including market analysis & competitor analysis
Premium Content Creation: 16 pieces/month including blogs
context: From document: Services and Pricing Menu for Ulti Tool Media — chunk 5 (chunk 5/10)
